{{Infobox character
| name = Elder of Urg’naut
| introduced = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Elder of Urg’naut]] is a being that can mold itself into a vaguely human shape with an eye in the center of its head.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Elders]] of [[Urg’naut]] watched the [[Knight-Adjunct]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Elders]] of [[Urg’naut]] collapsed and melted into darkness during the event.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Great Elders]]
